issue_title: ExtendedMessageFormat: OutOfMemory with custom format registry and a pattern containing single quotes

method_signature.params_string: String pattern, ParsePosition pos, StringBuffer appendTo, boolean escapingOn

buggy_code_comment: /** * Consume a quoted string, adding it to appendTo if * specified. * * @param pattern pattern to parse * @param pos current parse position * @param appendTo optional StringBuffer to append * @param escapingOn whether to process escaped quotes * @return appendTo */
